refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid recovery from faults.
refined_fr.rationale: Availability KPI is decomposed into minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid recovery to address both prevention and mitigation aspects of availability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure system uptime and downtime over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: Enable rapid fault detection and recovery

candidate_dps: Redundant system components and failover mechanisms
Real-time health monitoring and predictive maintenance
Automated fault detection and recovery procedures
selected_dp.selected_dp: Real-time health monitoring and predictive maintenance

potential_sources: Dependency on telemetry data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
Interaction with Safety Services for fault alerts
coupling_check.notes: DP logically focuses on monitoring and maintenance, which can be modularized with clear interfaces, minimizing coupling.

assumptions_risks: Risk of delayed fault detection impacting availability
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating automated recovery procedures in next decomposition level to reduce risk.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level monitoring and availability management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for health monitoring

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts to Safety Services upon detection of critical faults

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Facilitates communication between NGHE Solution and Teleoperation for coordinated availability management

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as availability management is a system-level function; low diffusion risk due to centralized monitoring.
Partial containment possible but would increase diffusion due to distributed monitoring.
Lower containment and higher diffusion risk if monitoring is split here.
Primarily for safety alerts, not suitable for containment of availability monitoring.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing availability monitoring and management within NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves ownership clarity.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Dependency on timely and accurate telemetry data from other modules
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth and consider sub-module decomposition within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR by focusing on real-time monitoring and predictive maintenance to meet availability targets.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support assignment to NGHE Solution with clear interface boundaries.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring availability metrics and monitoring telemetry data flows through defined interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of availability management to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: In next level, refine fault recovery mechanisms and consider integration with Safety Services for high safety criticality.
Evaluate telemetry data reliability and latency impacts.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, the high safety criticality and risk of delayed fault detection suggest refining fault recovery and safety integration at this level.
next_level_sub_frs: Enable rapid fault detection and recovery

revise.why: To explicitly incorporate fault recovery and safety integration aspects reflecting high safety criticality.

assumptions: Telemetry data is reliable and timely
Centralized monitoring is feasible within NGHE Solution module
open_risks: Complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Telemetry data latency and reliability metrics
Availability measurement data over evaluation period
